name: create_playlist
description: Create a new playlist for the authenticated user. Set the name, description, and whether it is public or private.

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: The Spotify user ID of the playlist owner. Use 'me' for the authenticated user.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the new playlist.

parameters.name: description
parameters.example: Songs for a long drive through the countryside

parameters.name: public
parameters.description: Whether the playlist should be public. Default is true.

parameters.name: collaborative
parameters.description: Whether the playlist should be collaborative. Must be false for public playlists.

body.name: Road Trip Mix
body.description: Songs for a long drive through the countryside

body.name: Road Trip Mix
body.description: Songs for a long drive through the countryside
